title: Truly Unbreakable
description: Makes your items Unbreakable at unbreaking level 3.
body:
Tired of your most cherished tools and armor succumbing to the ravages of time and combat? Truly Unbreakable offers a refined solution, transforming items bearing the coveted Unbreaking III enchantment into paragons of durability. No longer will you need to fear the slow grind of wear and tear, as this mod bestows upon your gear the blessing of absolute resilience, ensuring that they remain by your side through countless adventures without ever breaking.

This modification empowers you to invest in your equipment without the looming specter of breakage. By identifying and imbuing items with Unbreaking III, Truly Unbreakable unlocks a new level of permanence and reliability. Experience the freedom of knowing that your most trusted tools and protectors will endure any challenge, allowing you to delve deeper into your world, build grander structures, and face fiercer foes with unwavering confidence.
